VAT rate on Goods

VAT Act has aready been subsumed under GST Act. At present the only product that is leviable under VAT Act is Natural Gas

1 Petroleum Products 4th Schedule
1 (i) Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) 4th Schedule 5
1 (ii) High Speed Diesel Oil (HSD) 4th Schedule 40 Note: This rate has been reduced to 22.76 as per notification No. SRO 345/2018 issued u/s 10 of KGST Act, 1963
1 (iii) [*] Motor Spirit (commonly known as petrol) 4th Schedule 50 [*] Motor Spirit(including light diesel oil but excluding petrol, naphtha,aviation turbine fuel and high speed diesel oil).

Note:This rate has been reduced to 30.08 as per notification No. SRO 345/2018 issued u/s 10 of KGST Act, 1963

1 (iv) [*] omitted 4th Schedule [*] Petrol other than naphtha (omitted as per Kerala GST Act, 2017)
2 Foreign Liquor: 4th Schedule
2 (i) Bottled Wine, imported from outside the country and has suffered duty under the Customs Act, 1962 4th Schedule 37 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (ii) Bottled Foreign liquor other than wine, imported from outside the country and has suffered duty 4th Schedule 115 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (iii) Beer not covered under sub-entry (ii) above 4th Schedule 112 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (iV) Wine not covered under sub-entry (i) above 4th Schedule 82 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (V) Foreign liquor not covered under sub- entries (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv) above 4th Schedule KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (V) (a) for which purchase value incurred is above Rupees 400 per case 4th Schedule 247 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
2 (V) (b) other Foreign Liquor, not covered under items (i) and (ii) above 4th Schedule 237 KGST Amendment Ordinance 2020
